name: NeverFires
description:
Stub component. Declares an OUT port whose channel is never written. Used to satisfy Kinner's 'every in-port must be bound' requirement (E009) when modeling 'this in-port has no upstream sender' -- e.g., Polecat's PARK_IN/WAKE_IN ports in projects that don't exercise the parking lifecycle.

The channel from NeverFires.OUT to its bound receiver stays in NotSent forever; the receiver's tag-matching triple is never enabled. See backlog/151-no-sender-binding-sugar.md for the language-level alternative (deliberate `null` binding).

OUT.description: stubbed out-port; channel is never written

actors.name: NeverFires
actors.owner: Single state, no transitions out. The OUT channel sits in NotSent forever.
